ul.li: Edge-triggered: must handle ALL available data
May get partial data or multiple commands
Check if buffer has complete RESP frame

resp_parse_partial() returns:
PARSE_INCOMPLETE (need more data)
PARSE_COMPLETE (got command)
PARSE_ERROR (malformed)
Must drain entire buffer before next epoll_wait
Can now re-arm for next epoll_wait
Next data will trigger new event

ol.li: Edge-triggered: get ONE notification per ready state
Must drain entire buffer before returning to epoll_wait
Loop continues parsing until EAGAIN (buffer empty)
If only handle one command and return, next data is LOST
This is why the while(1) loop in handle_client_io() is critical
